name: PAX FLOW Replacement Door
summary: PAX FLOW Replacement Door — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: Keep your customers’ vaporisers performing at their best with the PAX Flow Replacement Door – an official OEM part made exclusively for the PAX Flow Vaporiser. Featuring a precision magnetic seal, this replacement oven door ensures a secure fit, maintains optimal oven efficiency, and preserves vapour quality. Authentic PAX Labs replacement part – direct from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
